name_en: Monogram vintage backpack is here! I really love the combination of metal buckle elements and the monogram. Practical, retro, and beautiful all in one, the capacity really surprised me, it can satisfy short business trips. You really can't find this feeling in current backpacks, vintage styles are truly the best.
